html.body: [-:-] Given input is not a valid SBGN-ML file. [submap:entityVertex_9833110_1756] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_9705683_1749] Submaps are not supported. [submap:entityVertex_9833482_1762] Submaps are not supported. [process-arcs:reactionVertex_997309_154] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_913529_74] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_997314_142] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909729_11] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909718_63] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_997311_129] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909726_48] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909732_41] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_1015702_170] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909722_53] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909730_31] Product lines should be reversed [process-arcs:reactionVertex_909721_61] Product lines should be reversed [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_17957_240] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_383505_422] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_5462_230] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_70101_18] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5 [SquareCompartment:compartmentVertex_7660_76] CellDesigner requires thickness to be at least: 2.5
